description: In this video, Andrew Watson from the Solana Mobile team discusses the Saga phone, focusing on its unique features like the Seed Vault, which provides secure seed storage in a protected environment. He explains how developers can start building applications for Saga using familiar Android development tools.
topic_summary: Overview of the Solana Saga phone and its Seed Vault feature, along with guidance for developers on how to begin app development for the device [t=0:08 - t=2:80].
